name: Low Cal Pumpkin Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Each ground nutmeg and ginger
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened cream cheese, vanilla extract, and egg in a bowl.
Stir well until smooth.
2. Spread the mixture into the bottom of the pie shell.
3. In a mixing bowl or work bowl, combine the pumpkin puree, evaporated skim milk, remaining ingredients (sugar replacement, eggs, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger). Beat or process until well blended.
4. Carefully pour the mixture over the prepared pie shell.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 65-70 minutes, or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
Calories per 1/8 pie: 173 (filling) + 120 (shell) = 293
Diabetic exchanges: 1 bread exchange for the shell; 1 high-fat meat and 1 fat exchange for the filling.
